title: rhodiola rosea var. oblonga
intro: Rhodiola rosea var. oblonga is a subvariety of the Rhodiola rosea plant, also known as golden root, which is a perennial flowering plant native to the Arctic regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Rhodiola rosea var. oblonga include its adaptogenic and antioxidant effects, which help to protect the body against stress and promote overall well-being. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress and anxiety, improving mental performance and memory, and boosting the immune system, as well as potentially alleviating symptoms of depression and fatigue. Rhodiola rosea var. oblonga is commonly prepared as a herbal supplement in capsule or powder form, as well as infused in tea, and is often used to support mental and physical resilience.
